mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPRING_BOOT.FILES (FILE_NUM , FILE_GROUP_ID , OBFUSCATE_NAME , DISPLAY_NAME , EXTEND_NAME , FILE_LENGTH , FILE_PATH) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(FILE_NUM),0)+1 FROM FILES WHERE FILE_GROUP_ID = #{fileGroupId}) , #{fileGroupId} , #{obfuscateName} , #{displayName} , #{extendName} , #{fileLength} , #{filePath})
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_NUM , FILE_GROUP_ID , OBFUSCATE_NAME , DISPLAY_NAME , EXTEND_NAME , FILE_LENGTH , FILE_PATH FROM SPRING_BOOT.FILES WHERE FILE_GROUP_ID = #{fileGroupId} AND FILE_NUM = #{fileNum}
